businessInfo.services: Manual and automatic driving lessons, Pass Plus, and intensive courses
businessInfo.hourlyRate: 38 pounds per hour, or 350 pounds for a 10-hour block

faq.a: Yes, we teach both manual and automatic.
Yes, we offer intensive and semi-intensive courses, ask the instructor for current availability.

faq.q: Can I use my own car?
faq.a: Lessons are in the instructor's dual-control car.
